
EXAMPLES FOR CHAPTER 14 - "PostScript Nine to Five".

The examples for this chapter require 34 KB.

Files contained in this folder:
	Manifest
	bbox.ps
	char.ps
	eps1.ps
	eps2.ps
	eps3.ps
	error1.ps
	error2.ps
	fonts1.ps
	fonts2.ps
	fonts3.ps (1)
	fonts4.ps (*)
	fonts5.ps (*)
	fonts6.ps (*)
	memusage.ps
	metrics.ps
	struct.ps
	triangle.ps (2)

(*)	Requires PostScript Level 2.

(1)	The line reading
		SaveWorld restore		%  restore VM to prior
	in the book is in the wrong position. The example has been fixed on
	this disk.
	
(2)	This example has a deliberate error. Please see the appropriate
	section in the book for an explanation.
	
